anomalies.title: Time-stop circuit breaker silently failed -- Feb 25 trade held 905 minutes
anomalies.detail: Trade entered 2026-02-25T04:28 exited 2026-02-25T19:33 via exchange_side_close. Config time_stop_bars=4 (1 hour at 15m). Bot did not exit. Exchange closed the position. Loss: -$64.90 (47% of $138 session equity).

anomalies.title: circuit_breaker single_trade_max_loss_usd not present in deployed config
anomalies.detail: User references single_trade_max_loss_usd: 30 and max_hold_hours: 6 but neither key exists in the current config.yaml on this machine. Either removed from config or Oracle Cloud is running a different config version.

anomalies.title: Both catastrophic losses exited via exchange_side_close, not bot logic
anomalies.detail: Feb 24 -$12.25 (462 min) and Feb 25 -$64.90 (905 min) both exited with reason exchange_side_close. The bot's own exit logic (time_stop, SL, max_hold) did not fire on either occasion. The exchange did the cleanup. This is a systemic gap in position control.

anomalies.title: Current open trade has negative EV: -$2.84
anomalies.detail: Open long (pullback, REDUCED tier, confluence 46) shows ev_usd=-2.844 in open_position snapshot. p_win=0.484, expected loss exceeds expected win after fees. EV gate is disabled (min_ev_usd: -999 in growth mode).

anomalies.title: Reconcile drift count: 11 today
anomalies.detail: _reconcile_drift_count_today=11 in state.json. Normal is 0-2. High drift means bot and exchange repeatedly disagreed about position state. This may be suppressing exit logic or causing re-entry after failed closes.

anomalies.title: 10-day net loss approximately -$60 on ~$450 account
anomalies.detail: Cumulative loss represents roughly 13% of starting capital in 10 days. loss_debt_usd=64.97 confirmed in state. Account equity at session start today: $138.32 derivatives (down from ~$200+ on Feb 17).

anomalies.title: Feb 18 +$10.45 win held 522 minutes -- same structural failure, lucky outcome
anomalies.detail: The 522-min short on Feb 18 exited via profit_lock at +$10.45. This was directional luck. The same structural failure (time stop not enforcing) produced the Feb 24-25 disasters. The system does not have reliable time-based position control in either direction.

anomalies.title: Negative EV trades regularly passing the gate
anomalies.detail: Multiple entries show ev_usd between -1 and -3.2. min_ev_usd: -999 in growth mode disables the EV gate entirely. Most entries have negative expected value after fees. Edge is being traded on confluence score and R:R ratio alone.

anomalies.title: Wait 867 minutes between last exit and current trade entry
anomalies.detail: Bot was effectively idle for 14+ hours before entering the current trade. Likely due to cooldown logic or overnight trading block after the Feb 25 loss.
